debug_info.goal:
tab : Table
tab_valid : tab.Valid
row : Row
row_valid : Valid tab row
y : ValidSplit tab row
⊢ ¬∃ q ∈ row.toPoseInterval, RupertPose q nopert.hull

failed_attempts:
intro ⟨q, hq, hr⟩
    cases y.subset q hq with
    | inl h => exact Solution.Row.valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid _ y.left_valid ⟨q, h, hr⟩
    | inr h => exact Solution.Row.valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid _ y.right_valid ⟨q, h, hr⟩

intro ⟨q, hq, hr⟩
    cases y.subset hq with
    | inl h => valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid y.left y.left_valid ⟨q, h, hr⟩
    | inr h => valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid y.right y.right_valid ⟨q, h, hr⟩

exact y.sound (valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid _ y.left_valid)
                  (valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid _ y.right_valid)

intro ⟨q, hq, hr⟩
    cases y.subset hq with
    | inl h => exact valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid _ y.left_valid ⟨q, h, hr⟩
    | inr h => exact valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid _ y.right_valid ⟨q, h, hr⟩

y.sound (valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid _ y.valL)
            (valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid _ y.valR)

intro ⟨q, hq, hr⟩
    cases y.subset hq with
    | inl h => exact valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid _ y.validLeft ⟨q, h, hr⟩
    | inr h => exact valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid _ y.validRight ⟨q, h, hr⟩
y.sound (valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid _ y.left) (valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid _ y.right)

intro ⟨q, hq, hr⟩
    let ⟨c, vc, mc⟩ := y.find q hq
    exact valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid c vc ⟨q, mc, hr⟩

intro ⟨q, hq, hr⟩
    rcases y.subset hq with h | h
    · exact valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid y.left y.left_valid ⟨q, h, hr⟩
    · exact valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid y.right y.right_valid ⟨q, h, hr⟩
